description_long: This is a tall, rectangular apartment building with a flat roof and a modern, geometric facade. The exterior features alternating vertical bands of brown and white, with large, regularly spaced windows and yellow balcony railings on both sides. The front of the building includes a recessed entrance area and a small pool or water feature, set within a black-bordered base platform. Each floor has a row of balconies, providing outdoor space for residents, and the windows are symmetrically aligned across all visible sides. The rear of the building is plain, lacking windows or balconies, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall structure suggests reinforced concrete and glass construction, typical of contemporary urban residential buildings.
description: A modern, multi-story apartment building with a flat roof, vertical color bands, and rows of balconies with yellow railings. The facade is symmetrical, with large windows and a recessed entrance at the base.
description_view_0: Side view showing vertical brown and white bands, rows of yellow-railed balconies, and a plain base platform.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, a recessed area with a pool, and symmetrical window and balcony arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with vertical bands and balconies, but no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, windowless wall with no balconies or architectural features.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically aligned in vertical columns, evenly spaced across each floor, with each window paired with a balcony on the sides.
